for_c_level: High risk posture due to total test failure, blocking production readiness assessment and any customer-facing claims on agent memory federation. No progress or changes versus prior runs as zero data was produced. Prioritize harness fixes to resume validation cadence.
for_non_technical: This test run didn't complete successfully, so we couldn't check if AI agents can reliably share memories with each other. The system set up the environment but failed to collect any results from the planned tests. As a result, we have no new information on memory sharing reliability.
for_sme: Complete failure mode where no scenario reports were recovered, impacting all requested scenarios (1,1b,2,4-6,9-18,22-25,28-42) across the 4-node federation mesh on DigitalOcean nyc3. Probable root cause is in the CI harness (SHA: 9e5f0972b964705e766b7f8253d06a0c993706e3) during report aggregation or infra provisioning. No specific primitives or testbook/probe identifiers (S#, F#) available due to missing reports.
headline: Campaign failed: no scenario reports recovered.
next_run_change: Investigate and resolve report recovery failures in the CI workflow before the next campaign.
what_it_proved: The run demonstrated a complete failure in the testing harness to recover any scenario reports, indicating an infrastructure or CI issue.
what_it_tested: No scenarios were exercised despite requesting 35 scenarios covering various agent-to-agent memory sharing across transport, framework, and primitive axes.
